headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — use today to drive the 'Generated Evaluations: No Ground Truth' design doc forward before the next bi-weekly TR.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake integrations — check env vars / credentials
quick_wins.why: Both data sources are broken; you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the design doc for AE-1079 (Generated evaluations — no ground truth)
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket, no due date set which means it could slip silently; evals is a key 26.4 deliverable per OKRs and the Big Rock TR agenda explicitly calls out evals

must_make_progress.task: Set a target due date on AE-1079 and move it to In Progress
must_make_progress.why: No due date creates ambiguity; locking one in signals commitment and makes status trackable

must_make_progress.task: Review latest Agents Big Rock TR page and telemetry appendix for March data updates
must_make_progress.why: Page notes March data still needs updating; understanding current funnel health will inform the evals design doc

must_communicate_with.about: Align on technical approach for generated evaluations without ground truth — get input before finalizing design doc
Coordinate on evals patterns (DeepRAG, BatchTransform) and any overlap with no-ground-truth evaluation work

must_report_status.note: Evals is listed as a key demo/deliverable in the Big Rock TR; have a shareable draft or outline ready before next TR cycle

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix or escalate to IT today.
Snowflake credentials are empty — product metrics and telemetry dashboards are inaccessible. Cannot update March data for TR appendix.
AE-1079 has no due date; risk of silent drift on a key OKR deliverable.
Autopilot is flagged Yellow/Risk in the Big Rock TR — monitor for any spillover impact on evals work.

outcomes.business_impact: No customer-facing impact captured today due to data source outages; restoring Salesforce/Snowflake access is the prerequisite for any escalation or metric-driven decisions.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are unavailable; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the highest-leverage adoption-driving work for the evals initiative this week.

slack_summary: Clear calendar today — your top priority is making real progress on the Generated Evaluations (no ground truth) design doc (AE-1079), a key deliverable for the Agents Big Rock. Both Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are broken, so fix credentials or escalate to IT to restore visibility on escalations and metrics. Zero meetings today — protect the time for deep work.
